message:
feat(db,search,server): search updater expansion and TUI archive/thread screen improvements

Search infrastructure:
- Expand search_updater in DB crate with additional index maintenance
  operations and incremental update capabilities (~67 lines)
- Expand updater in search-core crate with parallel index update logic
  and batch processing improvements (~67 lines)

TUI screens:
- Expand archive browser with additional navigation and display features
- Expand threads screen with improved thread rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
